channel.title: HUGO on Not a Peeker of Nature
channel.description: Recent content in HUGO on Not a Peeker of Nature

item.title: HUGO, follow-up
item.description: Hello, HUGO! Why? Inspired by the website of Prof.XiChen, I also want to build my own website using HUGO with gokarna theme. I think it’s a good way to record my thoughts and progresses, as well as a method to present myself. Besides, it can also encourage me to write more, which I think, is quite important to reorganize various pieces of knowledge and assimilate them into my own understanding.

item.title: Hello, HUGO!
item.description: Hello, HUGO! Why? Inspired by the website of Prof. Xi Chen, I also want to build my own website using HUGO with gokarna. I think it’s a good way to record my thoughts and progresses, as well as a method to present myself. Besides, it can also encourage me to write more, which I think, is quite important to reorganize various pieces of knowledge and assimilate them into my own understanding.
